# codex-go: Go SDK for the Codex app-server JSON-RPC protocol
# Version: v0.2.0 | Protocol schema: v2 | Module: github.com/nharness/sdk/codex-go | Go 1.25+

## Install
go get github.com/nharness/sdk/codex-go

## Client creation
client, err := codexgo.New(opts...)
# Transport opts (pick one):
#   WithStdioTransport(r, w)       -- local binary via stdin/stdout
#   WithWSTransport(dialCtx, url)  -- WebSocket (recommended for remote)
#   WithHTTPTransport(url)         -- WIP: HTTP+SSE; needs ws-http-bridge sidecar (else 405)
#   WithReconnectingHTTPTransport(url)  -- WIP: same bridge requirement
#   WithRetry(cfg)                 -- wrap current transport with retry
# Auth opts:
#   WithHTTPBearerToken(token)
#   WithWSBearerToken(token)
# Handler opts:
#   WithApprovalHandler(h)
#   WithRequestHandler(h)
# Concurrency opts:
#   WithMaxThreads(n)  -- -1=unlimited, 0=default(64)

## High-level session API (recommended)
thread, err := client.StartThread(ctx, opts...)   // returns *SessionThread
thread, err := client.ResumeThread(ctx, id, opts...)
thread.Close()  // release semaphore slot

# ThreadOption helpers:
#   WithThreadModel(model), WithThreadApprovalMode(mode), WithThreadCWD(cwd)
#   WithThreadEphemeral(bool), WithInitialInput(input)

result, err := thread.Run(ctx, "prompt", opts...)   // synchronous turn
# TurnOption: WithModel, WithApprovalMode, WithSandboxMode, WithCWD, WithEffort, WithSkill, WithInputs

result.FinalAgentText() string  -- last agent-message text (searches Items, Turn.Items, DeltaText)
result.Turn.Status              -- "completed" | "interrupted" | "failed"
result.Usage                    -- *TokenUsage; nil when server does not report it
result.Items                    -- []Item captured via streaming events
result.DeltaText                -- streaming delta fallback text

events, err := thread.RunStreamed(ctx, "prompt")  // streaming; drain or cancel ctx

## Client methods (all take context.Context)
Initialize(ctx, InitializeRequest) (InitializeResult, error)
ThreadStart(ctx, ThreadStartRequest) (Thread, error)
ThreadResume(ctx, ThreadResumeRequest) (Thread, error)
ThreadRead(ctx, ThreadReadRequest) (Thread, error)
ThreadFork(ctx, ThreadForkRequest) (Thread, error)
ThreadList(ctx, ThreadListRequest) ([]Thread, error)
ThreadLoadedList(ctx) ([]string, error)
ThreadArchive(ctx, ThreadArchiveRequest) error
ThreadUnarchive(ctx, ThreadUnarchiveRequest) error
ThreadSetName(ctx, ThreadSetNameRequest) error
ThreadRollback(ctx, ThreadRollbackRequest) error
TurnStart(ctx, TurnStartRequest) (Turn, error)
TurnInterrupt(ctx, TurnInterruptRequest) error
TurnSteer(ctx, TurnSteerRequest) error
TurnDiff(ctx, TurnDiffRequest) (TurnDiffResult, error)
TurnRead(ctx, threadID, turnID string) (Turn, error)
ThreadGoalSet/Get/Clear(ctx, req)
SetModel(ctx, model) / SetApprovalPolicy(ctx, policy) / SetSandboxPolicy(ctx, policy)
Models(ctx) ([]string, error)
# Config CRUD:
ConfigRead(ctx, ConfigReadRequest) (ConfigReadResult, error)
ConfigValueWrite(ctx, ConfigValueWriteRequest) error
ConfigBatchWrite(ctx, ConfigBatchWriteRequest) error
# Skills:
SkillsList(ctx, SkillsListRequest) (SkillsListResult, error)
SkillsConfigWrite(ctx, SkillsConfigWriteRequest) (SkillsConfigWriteResult, error)
SkillsExtraRootsSet(ctx, SkillsExtraRootsSetRequest) error
# Experimental features:
ExperimentalFeatureList(ctx, ExperimentalFeatureListRequest) (ExperimentalFeatureListResult, error)
ExperimentalFeatureEnablementSet(ctx, req) (ExperimentalFeatureEnablementSetResult, error)
# Hooks (server-side; not the client-side hook bridge):
HooksList(ctx, HooksListRequest) (HooksListResult, error)
# Thread extras:
ThreadMetadataUpdate(ctx, req) (ThreadMetadataUpdateResult{Thread}, error)
ThreadUnsubscribe(ctx, req) (ThreadUnsubscribeResult{Status}, error)  -- status: notLoaded|notSubscribed|unsubscribed
ThreadDelete(ctx, ThreadDeleteRequest) error
ThreadInjectItems(ctx, req) error  -- {ThreadID, Items []json.RawMessage}
ThreadShellCommand(ctx, req) error  -- {ThreadID, Command}; unsandboxed, preserves shell syntax
ThreadApproveGuardianDeniedAction(ctx, req) error  -- {ThreadID, Event json.RawMessage}
# Model provider capabilities:
ModelProviderCapabilitiesRead(ctx) (ModelProviderCapabilities{NamespaceTools,ImageGeneration,WebSearch}, error)
# Interactive command exec (PTY):
CommandExec(ctx, CommandExecRequest) (CommandExecResult, error)
CommandExecWrite/Resize/Terminate(ctx, req) error
CommandExecHandle(processID) *CommandExecHandle  -- Write/CloseStdin/Resize/Terminate helpers
# stream via CommandExecOutputDeltaEvent on Events()
Ping(ctx) error
Close() error

## Wait helpers
WaitForTurn(ctx, threadID, turnID) (Turn, error)
WaitForFinalAgentMessage(ctx, threadID, turnID) (string, error)
WaitForStructuredOutput(ctx, threadID, turnID, &out) (Turn, error)

## SessionThread methods
thread.ID() string
thread.Run(ctx, input, opts...) (*TurnResult, error)
thread.RunStreamed(ctx, input, opts...) (<-chan ThreadEvent, error)
thread.Steer(ctx, turnID, input) error
thread.SteerInputs(ctx, turnID, inputs...) error
thread.Interrupt(ctx, turnID) error
thread.Archive(ctx) / Unarchive(ctx) / SetName(ctx, name) error
thread.Fork(ctx, turnID, opts...) (*SessionThread, error)
thread.Rollback(ctx, turnIDs) error
thread.Compact(ctx) error
thread.GitDiff(ctx, turnID) (string, error)
thread.SetGoal/GetGoal/ClearGoal(ctx, ...) error

## Event subscription
sub := client.Events()
defer sub.Close()
for event := range sub.C() {
    switch v := event.Value.(type) {
    case codexgo.ItemAgentMessageDeltaEvent: // v.Text
    case codexgo.TurnCompletedEvent:         // v.TurnID, v.Status, v.Usage
    case codexgo.ItemCompletedEvent:         // v.Item
    }
}

## Key types
Thread{ID, Name, Status ThreadStatus, Turns []Turn}
Turn{ID, Items []Item, ItemsView TurnItemsView, Status TurnStatus, Usage *TokenUsage, StartedAt, CompletedAt *time.Time}
Item{ID, Kind ItemKind, Payload json.RawMessage}
TurnResult{Turn, Items []Item, Usage *TokenUsage, Error *TurnError, DeltaText string}
TokenUsage{InputTokens, OutputTokens, TotalTokens int}

## Enums (wire values in quotes)
ThreadStatus: "notLoaded" | "idle" | "active" | "systemError"
TurnStatus: "inProgress" | "completed" | "interrupted" | "failed"
TurnItemsView: "notLoaded" | "summary" | "full"
ApprovalMode: "auto" | "on-request" | "never" | "always"
SandboxMode: "read-only" | "workspace-write" | "full-auto"
ItemKind: userMessage | agentMessage | plan | reasoning | commandExecution | fileChange |
  mcpToolCall | dynamicToolCall | collabAgentToolCall | subAgentActivity | webSearch |
  imageView | imageGeneration | sleep | enteredReviewMode | exitedReviewMode |
  contextCompaction | hookPrompt

## ApprovalHandler interface
HandleCommandExecutionApproval(ctx, CommandExecutionApprovalRequest) (CommandExecutionApprovalResult, error)
HandleFileChangeApproval(ctx, FileChangeApprovalRequest) (FileChangeApprovalResult, error)
HandlePermissionsApproval(ctx, PermissionsApprovalRequest) (PermissionsApprovalResult, error)
HandleUserInputRequest(ctx, UserInputRequest) (UserInputResult, error)
# Decision values: accept | acceptForSession | decline | cancel (+ exec/network policy amendments)

## Server-push notification types
TurnStartedEvent, TurnCompletedEvent{Usage *TokenUsage}, ItemStartedEvent, ItemCompletedEvent,
ItemUpdatedEvent, TurnDiffUpdatedEvent, TurnPlanUpdatedEvent, ThreadTokenUsageUpdatedEvent,
ThreadStartedEvent, ThreadArchivedEvent, ThreadUnarchivedEvent, ThreadClosedEvent,
ThreadStatusChangedEvent, ThreadGoalUpdatedEvent, ThreadGoalClearedEvent,
ServerRequestResolvedEvent, ErrorEvent,
ItemAgentMessageDeltaEvent{Text}, ItemPlanDeltaEvent{Text},
ItemReasoningSummaryTextDeltaEvent{Text}, ItemReasoningTextDeltaEvent{Text},
ItemCommandExecutionOutputDeltaEvent{Delta}, ItemFileChangePatchUpdatedEvent,
ItemAutoApprovalReviewStartedEvent, ItemAutoApprovalReviewCompletedEvent
# Extra notifications (events_extra.go) — 65/68 notifications typed:
ThreadDeletedEvent, ThreadNameUpdatedEvent, ThreadCompactedEvent, ThreadSettingsUpdatedEvent,
AccountUpdatedEvent, AccountRateLimitsUpdatedEvent, WarningEvent, ConfigWarningEvent,
DeprecationNoticeEvent, GuardianWarningEvent, WindowsWorldWritableWarningEvent,
WindowsSandboxSetupCompletedEvent, ModelReroutedEvent, ModelVerificationEvent,
TurnModerationMetadataEvent, ProcessExitedEvent, ProcessOutputDeltaEvent,
TerminalInteractionEvent, McpToolCallProgressEvent, HookStartedEvent, HookCompletedEvent,
RawResponseItemCompletedEvent, McpServerStatusUpdatedEvent, McpServerOauthLoginCompletedEvent,
SkillsChangedEvent, FsChangedEvent, AppListUpdatedEvent, RemoteControlStatusChangedEvent,
ExternalAgentConfigImportCompletedEvent, ExternalAgentConfigImportProgressEvent,
ThreadRealtime{Started,Closed,Error,ItemAdded,Sdp,OutputAudioDelta,TranscriptDelta,TranscriptDone}Event
# Unknown methods -> RawNotificationEvent (3 schema-only notifications remain untyped)

## Docs
docs/index.md         -- quickstart, transport table, SessionThread guide
docs/api-reference.md -- full signatures, types, constants
